goal: Fix the bug in calculator.py's average() function so it correctly computes the arithmetic mean of a list of numbers and does not crash on single-element lists
scope: Verify fix by running all tests in test_calculator.py

acceptance_criteria.check: Is the average() function dividing by the correct denominator (len(numbers), not len(numbers) - 1)?
Does the average() function correctly handle single-element lists without crashing?
